overall.description: First-person night footage of walking down a narrow dirt trail surrounded by tall grass and trees, illuminated only by a flashlight or headlamp. The clip shows continuous forward movement through a dark, isolated natural environment with extremely limited visibility beyond the light beam.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow dirt trail through dense grassy woodland at night

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the dark trail, illuminating the path ahead with a flashlight while surrounded by tall grass and trees

entered.detail: narrow unpaved path with visible tire tracks and loose soil, illuminated by the flashlight
dense tall grass lining the left side of the trail, swaying slightly
dense tall grass lining the right side of the trail
dark silhouette of trees and bushes forming the left boundary of the trail
dark silhouette of trees and bushes forming the right boundary of the trail

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt trail through dense vegetation at night. The path is illuminated only by a flashlight, revealing tall grass on both sides and dark tree lines in the distance. The environment is completely isolated with no other visible entities or structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a desolate dirt trail that remains shrouded in deep nocturnal isolation. It begins with the camera advancing steadily through dense vegetation, where a single flashlight beam cuts through the oppressive darkness. As the camera pushes further into the environment, the light reveals walls of tall grass flanking the narrow path and the silhouettes of distant tree lines. The scene maintains this claustrophobic focus on the immediate trail, moving deeper into the void where no other structures or entities emerge from the shadows.
